signals.headline: Powell Confirms Tariffs Are Fueling Inflation and Risking Higher Unemployment in 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms Tariffs Are Fueling Inflation and Risking Higher Unemployment in 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated in a speech on Wednesday that President Trump's tariffs—announced this month with baseline 10% duties on most partners and 145% on China, plus a 90-day reprieve for some—are already driving up inflation, with effects likely persistent through 2

signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volume**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" and broader "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?", with the 1080-1119 range priced at **18% probability** amid $17.1M total trading volume across 130+ tweet-related markets[1][2]
